intelligence.industry: Window Washing and Exterior Cleaning Services
intelligence.target_persona: Homeowners and local property managers in Ocean City, NJ and surrounding beach towns seeking professional, reliable, and insured window washing services.

brand.name: Window Washing Wizard
brand.objection_handle: We guarantee timely, professional service with OSHA-approved equipment, fully insured and licensed for complete peace of mind.

hero.headline: Professional Window Washing in Ocean City, NJ
hero.subtext: Fast, reliable, and insured window cleaning for homes and properties?starting at $350 for 2 story homes.

about.story_text: Window Washing Wizard is a locally owned and operated business serving Ocean City, NJ and surrounding beach towns. We pride ourselves on fast, professional service using OSHA-approved equipment. Fully insured and licensed, we guarantee timely work and transparent pricing.
about.founder_note: As the founder, I am committed to delivering crystal clear windows with dependable service you can trust. Your satisfaction is our priority.

features.title: Fast & Reliable Service
features.description: We respect your time with prompt arrivals and efficient window cleaning.

features.title: Fully Licensed & Insured
features.description: Our team uses OSHA-approved equipment and holds full licensing and insurance for your peace of mind.

features.title: Transparent Pricing
features.description: Clear, upfront pricing starting at $350 for 2-story homes with no hidden fees.

features.title: Local Expertise
features.description: Proudly serving Ocean City and nearby beach communities with trusted local knowledge.
